# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: "security.istio.io/v1beta1"
kind: "PeerAuthentication"
metadata:
  name: "default"
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
apiVersion: "networking.istio.io/v1alpha3"
kind: "EnvoyFilter"
metadata:
  name: "enable-admin-interface"
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: "*"
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: CLUSTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      cluster:
        name: "passthrough.cluster"
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        lbPolicy: ROUND_ROBIN

  - applyTo: LISTENER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      listener:
        filterChain:
          filter:
            name: "envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager"
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        trafficDirection: INBOUND
        perFilterConfig:
          envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager:
            adminAccessLogPath: "/dev/stdout"
            statsSinks:
            - name: envoy.stat_sinks.hystrix
              typedConfig:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.stat_sinks.hystrix.v3.HystrixSink
                hystrixStatsStreamHost: "127.0.0.1"
                hystrixStatsStreamPort: 15000

---
apiVersion: "networking.istio.io/v1alpha3"
kind: "ServiceEntry"
metadata:
  name: "admin-interface"
spec:
  hosts:
  - "localhost"
  ports:
  - number: 15000
    name: admin
    protocol: HTTP
  location: MESH_INTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
